text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yeah... I'm... fine... I have to do my best for the
next race...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to be in a ton of races... so I can bring
happiness to everyone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's pushing herself way too hard. I should
probably adjust her racing schedule.
